name: arch-hub-transition
goal: Turn the active arch skill into a thin Lev-native engineering hub shell while moving the broader engineering corpus into skills-db.

must_drop: trying to contain the whole engineering domain inside one active skill
duplicate generic architecture content already present in skills-db

delegation_targets.when: broad architecture ontology, family comparison, subsystem decompilation, engineering query expansion
deliberation, adversarial taxonomy tests, multi-agent architecture review
architecture is settled and implementation planning starts

next_move: Review this transition shape before touching the active arch skill.
